# IdeaFlow

> Research-backed startup ideas for builders and entrepreneurs. We publish deep-dive breakdowns with market data, TAM estimates, and execution roadmaps.

## Articles

Our articles cover startup ideas across SaaS, ecommerce, AI, solo business, and more. Each article includes market research, competition analysis, and how-to guidance.

## Categories

- SaaS ideas: /ideas/category/saas
- AI business ideas: /ideas/category/ai
- Home business: /ideas/category/home-business
- Ecommerce: /ideas/category/ecommerce

## Popular articles

- B2B SaaS ideas: /ideas/b2b-saas-ideas
- Micro-SaaS ideas: /ideas/micro-saas-ideas
- AI business ideas: /ideas/ai-business-ideas
- Home business ideas: /ideas/home-business-ideas
- Side hustle ideas: /ideas/side-hustle-ideas

## Subscription

Pro subscribers get full access to all premium research. $29/month at /#pricing.
